name: Garlic Butter Pasta
description: A simple pantry pasta recipe that gives the assistant more chances to manage timers and visual checks without being too complex.

steps.title: Set up ingredients
steps.instruction: Bring out pasta, butter, garlic, salt, pepper, parmesan, a pot, and a skillet.
tips: Measure everything before the pasta finishes cooking so the sauce comes together quickly.

steps.title: Boil the water
steps.instruction: Fill the pot with water, salt it generously, and bring it to a boil.
tips: The water should taste lightly seasoned, not bland.

steps.title: Cook the pasta
steps.instruction: Add the pasta and cook until just al dente, stirring occasionally.
tips: Reserve a little pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Make the garlic butter base
steps.instruction: Melt butter in a skillet over low heat and gently cook the garlic until fragrant.
tips: Do not let the garlic brown deeply or it can become bitter.

steps.title: Combine and loosen the sauce
steps.instruction: Add the drained pasta to the skillet and toss with the garlic butter, using a splash of pasta water if needed.
tips: A little reserved water helps the butter coat the noodles more evenly.

steps.title: Finish and plate
steps.instruction: Season with pepper, add parmesan, toss again, and serve immediately.
tips: Taste before adding more salt because the pasta water and cheese may already be enough.
